concept: Pygame graphics library: screen initialization, surface rendering, event polling, and color tables. Pure API data — no rules, no references to any other library; the pattern vials bind to it through 'provides' and 'is_a graphics_library'.
facts:
import pygame
pygame.init()
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((640, 480))
clock = pygame.time.Clock()

import pygame
import random
pygame.init()
pygame.font.init()
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((640, 480))
font = pygame.font.SysFont('Arial', 48)
def draw_text(screen, text):
    screen.fill((30, 30, 40))
    img = font.render(text, True, (0, 255, 255))
    screen.blit(img, (150, 200))
    pygame.display.flip()
